Index

A C D G M R S V 
All Classes and Interfaces|All Packages

A

addCustomer(String) - Static method in class DBHelper
adds a customer to the database
addGenre(String) - Static method in class DBHelper
adds a genre to the database
addMovie(String, int) - Static method in class DBHelper
adds a movie under a genre

C

Customers - Class in Unnamed Package
customers screen - admin can register and remove customers
Customers() - Constructor for class Customers
sets up the customers gui

D

DBHelper - Class in Unnamed Package
this class is for connecting to the database and doing queries we use it in all the other classes to save and get data
DBHelper() - Constructor for class DBHelper
 

G

Genres - Class in Unnamed Package
genres screen - admin can add and remove genres here
Genres() - Constructor for class Genres
sets up the genres gui
getBorrowedMovies(int) - Static method in class DBHelper
gets borrowed movies for a customer (not returned yet)
getConnection() - Static method in class DBHelper
connects to the mysql database and returns the connection
getCustomerId(String) - Static method in class DBHelper
gets a customer id from their name
getCustomerNames() - Static method in class DBHelper
gets all active customer names
getGenreId(String) - Static method in class DBHelper
gets a genre id from its name
getGenreNames() - Static method in class DBHelper
gets all the active genre names
getMovieId(String) - Static method in class DBHelper
gets a movie id from its title
getMovieTitles(int) - Static method in class DBHelper
gets movie titles for a genre
getReturnedMovies(int) - Static method in class DBHelper
gets returned movies for a customer

M

main(String[]) - Static method in class VideoLibrarySystem
main method - launches the app
Movies - Class in Unnamed Package
movies screen - admin can add and remove movies here you pick a genre first then add a movie under it
Movies() - Constructor for class Movies
sets up the movies gui

R

removeCustomer(String) - Static method in class DBHelper
removes a customer (sets isactive to 0)
removeGenre(String) - Static method in class DBHelper
removes a genre (sets isactive to 0)
removeMovie(String) - Static method in class DBHelper
removes a movie (sets isactive to 0)
Rentals - Class in Unnamed Package
rentals screen - customer can rent and return movies here
Rentals() - Constructor for class Rentals
sets up the rentals gui
rentMovie(int, int) - Static method in class DBHelper
rents a movie to a customer
returnMovie(int, String) - Static method in class DBHelper
marks a movie as returned

S

start(Stage) - Method in class VideoLibrarySystem
this is where everything starts when the app opens

V

VideoLibrarySystem - Class in Unnamed Package
main class for our video library system you can login as admin or customer
VideoLibrarySystem() - Constructor for class VideoLibrarySystem
